final:
module lfsr_12 
(
  input rst,
  input clk,

  output reg [11:0] lfsr_out
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) 
	begin
      lfsr_out <= 12'b000000000001;
    end 
	
	else 
	begin
      lfsr_out <= {lfsr_out[10:0], lfsr_out[11] ^ lfsr_out[10]};
    end
  end

endmodule
